---
title: "Agentic AI"
subtitle: "Building LLM-based Agentic AI Systems"
mermaid-format: svg
toc-depth: 2
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

## Lessons

| \# | Lesson | Slides | Lab / Colab | Exercise |
|---------------|---------------|---------------|---------------|---------------|
| 0 | Introduction | [Slides](./M1/00_intro.qmd) |  |  |
| 1 | Models | [Slides](./M1/01_models_slides.qmd) | [Lab](./M1/01_models.ipynb) ([Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/HassanAlgoz/B5/blob/main/content/M1/01_models.ipynb)) | [Ex1: Models](./M1/exercises/ex1_models.qmd) |
| 2 | LangGraph | [Slides](./M1/02_langgraph_slides.qmd) | [Lab](./M1/02_langgraph.ipynb) ([Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/github/HassanAlgoz/B5/blob/main/content/M1/02_langgraph.ipynb)) | [Ex2: Implement Agent](./M1/exercises/ex2_implement_agent.qmd) |
| 3 | Human-in-the-loop | [Human-in-the-loop](./M1/03_human-in-the-loop.qmd) |  |  |
| 4 | Agent (and its loop) |  | [Agent (and its loop)](./M1/04_agent.ipynb) | [Build a SQL agent](https://docs.langchain.com/oss/python/langchain/sql-agent) |
| 5 | State |  | [State](./M1/05_agent_state.ipynb) |  |

## [Need Help?](https://docs.langchain.com/oss/python/langchain/get-help)

[Ask LangChain docs AI](https://chat.langchain.com/) or

Get help from fellow developers and the LangChain team through our active community channels.

- [Community Forum](https://forum.langchain.com/): Ask questions, share solutions, and discuss best practices
- [Community Slack](https://www.langchain.com/join-community): Connect with other builders and get quick help
